task_updates.executor_notes: Updated src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.test.tsx to wrap AgentChat in a MemoryRouter, preserve the existing mock-hook pattern, and add coverage for queueing while processing, queued attachment snapshotting, duplicate-text optimistic clearing, failed-head queue retention/removal, and reorder/delete interactions. Verification: npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.test.tsx passes. npm test -- AgentChat now gets past the prior Router harness failure and fails only the new FLAG-001 regression test (keeps a failed head queued, shows an error, and only resumes draining after the failed head is removed) because the component retries the failed head instead of pausing until removal.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The new tests cover typing while processing without immediate mutateAsync calls, attachment snapshotting when the queue drains, duplicate-text optimistic clearing, failed-head retention plus delete-to-resume behavior, and reorder/delete UI updates. The failed-head case is currently red and exposes the remaining FLAG-001 behavior gap.
